ab: vayk amen a kivangavang kati kina tucu a qadav.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: namalingling a kalevelevan nu kamauqadavan, ika zalangzang ika vucelelj a kinaqadaqadavan, sarunguanguaq a vali.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: keman amen tua pang itua cauciuci a kadjunangan, cenglaven a nia kinacavacavan , maseljec amen aravac.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.
In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: kivadaq aken tjay kina, akuzua medjaljar a kalevelevan ku ayain.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅黃色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: matucu ti kina, palemek tu muri mangtjez anga raljiz aya.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: neka nu qurepus i kalevelevan tucu a qezemezemetj, sevacaq anga a vitjuqan.
ch: 今晚天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: muri pasa umaq anga amen uta.
ka pasa umaumaq i djalan, kiligu aken tua vitjuqan.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: tu ika mangtjez a raljiz, navenarung aken tua vaykanan a masasav.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
